intent: Consolidate the-flow's specify (1b) and architect (3) stages into one planning step that produces a single canonical <slug>-plan.md (business spec on top, implementation plan below). Keep sub-skills flow-blind, routing deterministic, lint green; seam only when live; no over-built migration. Mode Simple, full flow.
complete_note: 2026-06-16: flow marked COMPLETE by user — formal merge stage skipped (work committed directly to main). Review verdict was APPROVE; all 7 review follow-ups (F001-F007) cleared in a post-review fix pass; lint + slug clean, redeployed. Final step: commit + push to main (user-authorized git write).

Merged specify(1b)+architect(3) into one atomic `plan` verb (20-plan.md) producing one <slug>-plan.md (business spec + impl plan); Registry/Graph/coach/getting-started + flight-plan template regenerated; downstream merge/adr abort gates relaxed; just check-flow + slug check both green; deployed to canonical store. Review next.
review_note: 2026-06-16: review complete — verdict APPROVE (Simple, Manual). No HIGH/CRITICAL; 6 MEDIUM + 1 LOW follow-ups recorded, no fix-tasks.md.
